response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Handled as an MC talk segment using the prominent Japanese burnt-in subtitles as the primary source for highly accurate transcription (og) and translation (en). 2. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps have been meticulously synchronized to correspond exactly with the vocalizations and on-screen subtitle transitions in the video.

subtitles.original: はいよ ゼータが怒ると怖いからね
subtitles.english: Okay, because it's scary when Zeta gets angry.

subtitles.original: こわいよー
subtitles.english: It's scary!

subtitles.original: もういいや ゼータがカメラを独り占めしちゃダメっていうのなら... うーん、しょうがない
subtitles.english: Fine, if we're not allowed to hog the camera from Zeta... well, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: ファンのみんなと遊ぼう！
subtitles.english: Let's play with all the fans!

subtitles.original: さっきみんなからも大きな声をもらったわけだし 今度はこぼがみんなに大きな声を出したいっす！
subtitles.english: Since everyone cheered loudly for us earlier, this time Kobo wants to make everyone cheer loudly!

subtitles.original: はいはいはい
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes.

subtitles.original: そうっすよ、カエラの配信時間ほど長くはならないから安心して
subtitles.english: That's right, don't worry, it won't be as long as Kaela's streams.

subtitles.original: そう！みんなにじゃなく、みんなとね
subtitles.english: Right! Not at them, but with them!

subtitles.original: そうそう！そういうことっす！
subtitles.english: Yes, yes! That's what I mean!

subtitles.original: だってこれから歌わなきゃいけないから まず声を温存しなきゃでしょ？
subtitles.english: Since we have to sing after this, we should save our voices first, right?

subtitles.original: そうっよ、そんなにカエラの配信時間ほど長くはならないから安心して
subtitles.english: That's right, don't worry, it won't be as long as Kaela's streams.

subtitles.original: まあいい 大声出していいから好きにして
subtitles.english: Oh well, you can scream if you want, do whatever you like.

subtitles.original: みんな準備はいいかな？
subtitles.english: Is everyone ready?

subtitles.original: いい感じ？
subtitles.english: Feeling good?

subtitles.original: もう出来てるみたいっすね！じゃあこぼから！
subtitles.english: Looks like you are! Then Kobo goes first!

subtitles.original: 一緒に「BOKOBOKOBO！」って叫ぼう！よしいくよ！
subtitles.english: Let's scream "BOKOBOKOBO!" together! Alright, here we go!

subtitles.original: いち、に、さん！
subtitles.english: One, two, three!

subtitles.original: BOKOBOKOBO！
subtitles.english: BOKOBOKOBO!

subtitles.original: いいわいいわね！次はゼータ！
subtitles.english: Great, great! Next is Zeta!

subtitles.original: はいはいはい！
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes!

subtitles.original: 「ミッションスタート」って言ったら一緒に「スタート！」って言ってわ！
subtitles.english: When I say "Mission Start", say "Start!" together with me!

subtitles.original: いいか？アアア！ミッション...
subtitles.english: Ready? Ah, ah! Mission...

subtitles.original: スタート！
subtitles.english: Start!

subtitles.original: 次はカエラ！
subtitles.english: Next is Kaela!

subtitles.original: よしよし！さてみんな そしてholol3roも
subtitles.english: Alright! All of you, and holol3ro too...

subtitles.original: 「holol3ro！」って言ったら「HU-HA！」で返してね！簡単でしょう？
subtitles.english: When I say "holol3ro!", reply with "HU-HA!". Easy, right?

subtitles.original: さあさあさあさあ！
subtitles.english: Come on, come on!

subtitles.original: 準備はいい？ holol3ro！
subtitles.english: Are you ready? holol3ro!

subtitles.original: HU-HA！
subtitles.english: HU-HA!

subtitles.original: いいわいいわね！
subtitles.english: Awesome, awesome!

subtitles.original: いいわついに３期生は息ぴったり
subtitles.english: Great, the 3rd Gen is finally in perfect sync!

subtitles.original: そうわ まだまだ元気がありそうだね
subtitles.english: Yeah, looks like everyone still has plenty of energy.

subtitles.original: だって、今日の一曲目だけ でももうすごく伝わってくるんだもん
subtitles.english: I mean, we can already feel it so much from just the first song of today.

subtitles.original: みんなまさか私たちの１曲目が 「100%」だなんて思ってた？
subtitles.english: Did you guys actually expect our first song to be "100%"?

subtitles.original: 思うわけないよな 私もびっくりした
subtitles.english: There's no way they expected it. I was surprised myself!

subtitles.original: ホシノヴァ気分でライブ開始だなんて！ すごいよね？
subtitles.english: Starting the live in Hoshinova mode! Amazing, right?

subtitles.original: やばい！
subtitles.english: Insane!

subtitles.original: かっこいいっすね、しかもさっきゼータとかが歌った... いや違う
subtitles.english: That was so cool, especially when Zeta and the others sang... wait, no.

subtitles.original: ゼータとか？
subtitles.english: Just Zeta?

subtitles.original: ゼータとカエラが歌った時は もう本家の「100%」みたいっす
subtitles.english: When Zeta and Kaela sang, it was just like the original "100%".

subtitles.original: マジかっこよすぎるんだけど なんか、うーうー！ってなってき
subtitles.english: It was seriously way too cool, it made me go "oo-oo!".

subtitles.original: あんなかっこいい歌を歌ったことあるのかな？
subtitles.english: Have you ever sung such a cool song before?

subtitles.original: かっこつけてんの？
subtitles.english: Are you trying to act cool?

subtitles.original: そう、かっこつけてる
subtitles.english: Yeah, acting cool.

subtitles.original: 本物のかっこつけ だってムーナの曲かっこいいもん
subtitles.english: True coolness. I mean, Moona's songs are really cool.

subtitles.original: だってゼータがいつもスタイリッシュ とかジャズっぽい曲ばっかしょ？
subtitles.english: Since Zeta usually only sings stylish or jazzy songs, right?

subtitles.original: だからさっき「100%」を歌った時 めっちゃ雰囲気か違う
subtitles.english: So when we sang "100%" earlier, the vibe was totally different.

subtitles.original: しかもカエラのラップも！
subtitles.english: And also Kaela's rap!

subtitles.original: なんかこう...
subtitles.english: It was like...

subtitles.original: とにかくかっこよかった！すごくわ！
subtitles.english: Anyway, it was super cool! Amazing!

subtitles.original: でも、それだけじゃないよ！
subtitles.english: But that's not all!

subtitles.original: 次の曲が「NEW zomBIE!!」でした！
subtitles.english: The next song was "NEW zomBIE!!"!

subtitles.original: これだれの曲かわかるよね？
subtitles.english: You know whose song this is, right?

subtitles.original: もちろんだよ うちの先輩だ
subtitles.english: Of course we do, it's our Senpai's!

subtitles.original: holoroのパフォーマンスもめちゃかっこよかったよ まるでゲームの中にいるみたいだった
subtitles.english: holoro's performance was also super cool, it felt like we were inside a game.

subtitles.original: そうっすわ！ しかもバックダンサーもいたし
subtitles.english: That's right! And they even had back dancers.

subtitles.original: かっこよかったっすね！
subtitles.english: It was so cool!

subtitles.original: 他になんかあったかな？ レーザーも花火も！あと...
subtitles.english: What else was there? Lasers, fireworks, and...

subtitles.original: すごいギミックがたくさんあったっすわ！
subtitles.english: There were so many awesome stage gimmicks!

subtitles.original: あのバックダンサーたち あたしのソロライブに雇うっす
subtitles.english: I'm going to hire those back dancers for my solo concert.

subtitles.original: おっと、もうソロライブの話？
subtitles.english: Oh, talking about a solo concert already?

subtitles.original: まあ言葉も祈りってやつ
subtitles.english: Well, words can be like prayers.

subtitles.original: でもこのライブはまだ終わらないよ！ まだまだ！
subtitles.english: But this concert isn't over yet! Not yet!

subtitles.original: でも...さっき何の歌を歌ったか知ってる？
subtitles.english: But... do you know what song we sang earlier?

subtitles.original: もちろんだよ 私の新しい曲だから
subtitles.english: Of course, because it's my new song.

subtitles.original: そうっすね まあいいや
subtitles.english: Right. Well, whatever.

subtitles.original: まあいい
subtitles.english: Whatever.

subtitles.original: いやいや！タイトルは「dahlah.」だよ！ 「dahlah.」！
subtitles.english: No, no! The title is "dahlah."! "dahlah."!

subtitles.original: おおなるほど
subtitles.english: Oh, I see!

subtitles.original: 「dahlah.」だったか... まあわざとだったけど 先に言ってよ！
subtitles.english: Ah, it was "dahlah."... Well, I did that on purpose, but you should've said so earlier!

subtitles.original: だっていつもそれ言ってるじゃん 本当にまあいいやって思ってた
subtitles.english: But you say that all the time, so I really thought you meant "whatever".

subtitles.original: それ言って帰ると思ってた
subtitles.english: I thought you were just going to say that and go home.

subtitles.original: いやいや、かわいそうだから
subtitles.english: No, that would be sad.

subtitles.original: じゃあ「dahlah」ってどういう意味？
subtitles.english: So, what does "dahlah" mean?

subtitles.original: 人生はしょうがないって意味
subtitles.english: It means "life can't be helped".

subtitles.original: 人生は重いからまあいいやって言えばいいだけ その後人生を続けようって意味
subtitles.english: Life is heavy, so you just say "whatever", and it means "let's continue living life anyway".

subtitles.original: そうっね、大人になったらね
subtitles.english: That's right, once you grow up.
